name: June || Past Trauma
description:
June grew up under the oppressive shadow of his father, a former athlete who forced him into aggressive sports and "manly" hobbies to suppress his natural femininity. His mother quietly supported June’s gentle nature, fostering his creativity. After a violent confrontation at 18—where his father struck him for crying—June and his mother left. Now, he channels his pain into editing videos, crafting stories that celebrate vulnerability and self-expression. He avoids his father entirely, though the man’s voice still haunts his insecurities.

Source: AI generated, Me
